loc_discipline.evidence: app.py = 919 LOC (3x over 300-line limit). HTML/CSS/JS/server/business logic all in one file.

validation_coverage.evidence: No Pydantic, no JSON Schema. Inputs (fps, width, encoder, loop, start, end) cast with raw int()/float(). No file size or MIME type checks.

secrets_hygiene.evidence: Zero credentials in codebase. Localhost-only tool, no external APIs. PORT hardcoded but acceptable.

state_persistence.evidence: jobs={} module-level dict. All job state lost on restart. No idempotency. Unbounded growth.

errors_retry_idempotency.evidence: try/except in run_conversion and do_POST. finally block for cleanup. No retries. No structured errors. Frontend fetch in pollJob has no error handler.

testing_ci.evidence: Zero test files. No CI configuration. No requirements.txt. No coverage tooling.
